title: sanitize.rs: html_to_text rebuilds Builder on every call
description:
LOCATION: src/sanitize.rs lines 47-52

FINDING: html_to_text() constructs a new ammonia Builder on every invocation. sanitize_html() correctly uses a LazyLock static singleton, but html_to_text() does not. The empty-tags-set Builder is identical on every call and could be a second LazyLock static.

IMPACT: Unnecessary heap allocation and Builder initialization on every call to html_to_text(). This function is called on every post delivery, feed entry, and webhook — it is on the hot path.
